arts.ttl: Journalist believes club “rubbing their hands with glee” as Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool all follow player
arts.sum: Ajax are rubbing their hands at the interest in Jorrel Hato, with them not particularly bothered if he joins Arsenal, Chelsea or Liverpool. That’s according to journalist Mike Verweij, via Voetbal Primeur, who believes it is an ideal situation that Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool are continuing to be linked with the youngster. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool, Man City and Chelsea are lining up to sign attacking right-back
arts.sum: Flamengo’s 21-year-old right-back Wesley has emerged as one of the most sought-after talents in the upcoming transfer window. Known for his attacking quality, Wesley has attracted interest from several European giants, including Liverpool, Manchester City, Chelsea, Arsenal and Barcelona, according to Caught Offside sources.
